concepts.label: Requirements-Driven Semantic Gateway
concepts.definition: Architecture integrating STPA/STAMP, UCA four-mode coverage, a Simplex Action Gateway, SHACL/SWRL/SPARQL governance, and INCOSE RM four-level traceability.

concepts.label: AI Circuit Breaker
concepts.definition: Governance pattern that interrupts unsafe AI behavior; associated with Mean Time Between Hazards (MTBH) metrics and SE4AI research.

concepts.label: Holonic Semantic Architecture
concepts.definition: Architecture organizing semantic governance as nested holons that are simultaneously wholes and parts.

concepts.label: Wymore-Grounded Governance
concepts.definition: Governance grounded in A. Wayne Wymore's mathematical systems theory for rigorous system definition.

concepts.label: STPA / STAMP
concepts.definition: Systems-theoretic hazard analysis (STPA) built on the STAMP accident causality model.

concepts.label: SUDA Protocol
concepts.definition: Protocol developed within the Kearney KIH solution architecture work.

concepts.label: ORSD Framework
concepts.definition: Ontology Requirements Specification Document framework used in solution architecture deliverables.

concepts.label: FABRIC Holonic Architecture
concepts.definition: Seven-layer holonic architecture developed for Baxter Healthcare.

concepts.label: INCOSE Requirements Management (Four-Level Traceability)
concepts.definition: INCOSE requirements-management practice providing four levels of requirement traceability.

concepts.label: SHACL / SWRL / SPARQL Governance
concepts.definition: Constraint, rule, and query layer enforcing semantic governance over RDF knowledge graphs.
